description:
## Deep Component Audit — hx-card

**Component directory:** `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-card/`
**wc-mcp Health Score:** 94 (A)
**Known issues:** _hasSlotContent missing description.

### Audit Scope
1. **Design Tokens** — `--hx-` tokens. Padding, border-radius, shadow, background. Dark mode.
2. **Accessibility** — WCAG 2.1 AA. Semantic structure. Interactive cards (clickable) need proper roles. Focus management.
3. **Functionality** — Header/body/footer slots. Image slot. Clickable variant. Elevation variants. Slot content detection.
4. **TypeScript** — Strict. No `any`.
5. **CSS/Styling** — Shadow DOM. CSS Parts (header, body, footer, image). Responsive.
6. **CEM Accuracy** — Fix _hasSlotContent description.
7. **Tests** — 80%+ coverage. Slots. Clickable. Variants.
8. **Storybook** — All variants. Slot combinations. Interactive.
9. **Drupal Compatibility** — Content cards. Twig templates. Views integration.
10. **Portability** — CDN-ready.

### Deliverable
Detailed audit report. Fix CRITICAL+HIGH. Document rest.
title: Deep Audit v2: hx-card
